title: Unbound Visual +
description: Unbound Visual + is a  Complementary Unbound sheders edited with some Visual changes
body:
Unbound Visual + is a complementary Unbound shader that we edited with **several visual settings, the shader offers great visuals and stunning and bright light, smoother saturated colors and gradations**.
We have no problems or cons against sheders, we only modify other users' sheders, if there are any problems, contact us.



# Performance

If you experience lag, you can change the profile to **Low**, if it's still strong, you can change it to **Standard**, if it's strong, you can max it to **Ultra** for stunning visuals, which we call Visual +,If you want to be good, we added a new profile, namely Cinematic.


# Required

- Make sure you have installed **Iris** for the version of sheders you choose and the version of Minecraft you are playing.
- Installing **Fabric** (Original)
- Use special mods for optimizer and Ram (Optional)


# Credit

These sheds are modified sheds from Completentary Unbound, **we do not claim these sheds are ours**, these sheds are original from someone who makes sheds and Modrinth Creator.The creator is named EminGT and comes from Türkiye.he is known for making sheders which are definitely the brightest Complemantary Unbound and Complemantary Sheders and Complemantary Reimagined that we know of


# License

This sheders license can be modified and can be used by anyone but still follows the copyright rules of the Original Creator.https://opensource.org
